introSection: Boudewijn Seapark is a marine mammal park and theme park located in Sint-Michiels, Bruges, Belgium.

sections.title: Dolphins
sections.content: As of 2020 the park has eight bottlenose dolphins: Puck (F-53 years old), Linda (F-43 years old), Roxanne (F-34 years old), Yotta (F-21 years old), Indy (F-16 years old), Kite (M-14 years old), Moana (F-4 years old), and Ori (M-4 years old).

fullText:
Boudewijn Seapark is a marine mammal park and theme park located in Sint-Michiels, Bruges, Belgium.

As of 2020 the park has eight bottlenose dolphins: Puck (F-53 years old), Linda (F-43 years old), Roxanne (F-34 years old), Yotta (F-21 years old), Indy (F-16 years old), Kite (M-14 years old), Moana (F-4 years old), and Ori (M-4 years old).
categories: Buildings and structures in West Flanders
